narrative:
Vermilion Twp township has 3,700 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.5%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.1 percentage points.
